description: This dashboard plots all the important metrics for GCP Cloud Storage.
title: GCP Cloud Storage Dashboard

3c56b07a-3960-4c22-90d4-2257c5014f2e.name: project_id
3c56b07a-3960-4c22-90d4-2257c5014f2e.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'project_id'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%storage%'

3132fb2e-16fb-42d7-baa1-430aecfd0104.name: bucket_name
3132fb2e-16fb-42d7-baa1-430aecfd0104.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'bucket_name'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%storage%'

a245243b-cfc1-4141-8e43-9d747880f540.description: The deployment environment for the service.
a245243b-cfc1-4141-8e43-9d747880f540.name: deployment.environment
a245243b-cfc1-4141-8e43-9d747880f540.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'deployment.environment'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name like '%storage%'

widgets.description: Total size of all objects in the bucket, in bytes.
widgets.title: Total Storage Bytes

widgets.description: Total number of objects in the bucket.
widgets.title: Total Object Count

widgets.description: Total daily storage in byte-seconds used by the bucket, grouped by storage class.
widgets.title: Total Byte Seconds by Storage Class

widgets.description: Total size of all objects in each bucket, grouped by bucket name.
widgets.title: Total Bytes by Bucket

widgets.description: Total number of objects per bucket, grouped by bucket name.
widgets.title: Object Count by Bucket

widgets.description: Number of API calls made to Cloud Storage, grouped by method.
widgets.title: API Request Count by Method

widgets.description: Number of API calls made to Cloud Storage, grouped by response code.
widgets.title: API Request Count by Response Code

widgets.description: Total bytes received by the API, grouped by method.
widgets.title: API Received Bytes

widgets.description: Total bytes sent by the API, grouped by method.
widgets.title: API Sent Bytes

widgets.description: Count of bytes received over the network by the bucket.
widgets.title: Network Received Bytes

widgets.description: Count of bytes sent over the network by the bucket.
widgets.title: Network Sent Bytes

widgets.description: Number of objects pending replication, grouped by bucket.
widgets.title: Replication Object Count

widgets.description: Total bytes pending replication, grouped by bucket.
widgets.title: Bytes Pending Replication
